Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to generate 20 open ended questions based on the pseudo BPMN representation of a smartphone supply chain process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The questions should explore rationale improvements risk management decision making stakeholder communication and performance measurement

Name: Validation - PE
Text: I need to make sure they are all open ended and thought provoking and not include any SQL queries

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: First I should go through the BPMN process step by step

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process starts with market research then RD parallel gateways for securing components from various countries shipping to Malaysia assembly quality checks packing parallel shipping methods customs distribution inventory monitoring and adjustments

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For each part I can think of questions that dig into why certain steps are there

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For example why use a parallel gateway for securing components from different countries

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: What are the risks of relying on specific suppliers in different regions

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: How does the parallel shipping air vs cargo affect costs and delivery times

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I should also consider risk management

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: What if a component from one country is delayed

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: How do they handle quality issues in assembly

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Are there contingency plans for customs delays

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Decision making points like the exclusive gateways after quality checks and inventory monitoring

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: What criteria determine if a product passes quality or needs rework

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: How is the decision made to adjust supplier orders versus proceeding

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Stakeholder communication might involve how different teams RD procurement logistics coordinate

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: How do they ensure alignment between design and component availability

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: What communication channels are used for real time updates

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Performance measurement could include KPIs for each task

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: How do they measure the efficiency of the assembly plant

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: What metrics track the success of distribution strategies

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: How do they forecast sales and adjust inventory

Name: Validation - PE
Text: I need to make sure the questions are diverse covering all the mentioned areas

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Let me list them out making sure each question is open ended and encourages deep thinking without being too specific

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Avoid yes no questions

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Use phrases like How might What factors influence In what ways could What strategies could
